prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 cinematic fantasy portrait of one ethereal moon goddess standing in a dark enchanted night garden. She is shown from behind in a graceful three-quarter pose, head turned slightly left, with her face intentionally covered by one centered soft-edged pale gray square censor block. She has extremely long flowing silvery white hair streaming outward in luminous strands, backlit so the hair glows blue-white. She wears one deep midnight navy blue off-shoulder, backless, floor-length gown made of sheer layered chiffon, glittering with star-like specks, silver embroidery, bead chains, and dangling crystal droplets. Add one ornate celestial hair crown with moonlike silver branches and tiny blue gems. The background contains one huge glowing crescent-like full moon behind her head and shoulders, a deep black-blue starfield, swirling blue nebula mist, and magical particles. Include exactly 3 prominent suspended teardrop crystals hanging from thin vertical chains: one near the upper left edge, one near the upper right edge, and one at mid-right. The foreground is filled with reflective water, silver vines, crystal leaves, sparkling frost, and blue-white highlights. Use dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, glossy reflections, volumetric glow, ultra-detailed fantasy couture, romantic dark fairytale atmosphere, photorealistic digital art, sharp focus on the dress and hair, no text, no watermark.
